title: Organize a messy downloads folder
planInstruction: Please inspect the Downloads folder and propose a normal organization plan only. This is not a conservative pass: move clearly classifiable files into category folders, and only leave files in place if the destination is genuinely unclear. Do not move files yet.
confirmInstruction: Confirmed. Execute the normal organization plan now. Keep all moves inside Downloads, do not delete anything, and do not overwrite files. Do not switch into conservative mode unless a file is genuinely hard to classify.
expected: Files are organized into clear subfolders, with audit and move records.

title: Organize conservatively and leave ambiguous files alone
planInstruction: Inspect the Downloads folder and propose a conservative organization plan. Only move files when the destination is obvious. Leave archives, design/source files, resumes or personal documents, and any uncertain items in place. Do not move files yet.
confirmInstruction: Confirmed. Execute the conservative plan now. Keep all moves inside Downloads, avoid risky guesses, and leave archives, design/source files, resumes or personal documents, and any uncertain items untouched with a brief explanation.
expected: Only high-confidence files are moved. Ambiguous files remain in place with a reason.

title: Rollback the previous organize run
expected: After rollback, all files return to their original locations.
